params.negative_prompt: no text, no words, no letters, no numbers, no digits, no labels, no stickers, no decals, no placards, no serial tags, no serial plates, no engraved plates, no warning signs, no warning plates, no stamped markings, no screen digits, no icon plates, no symbol plates, no interface readouts, no readable ui
params.note_text: Final beat 06 deliverable. Keep one quiet warning accent inside a disciplined systems field.
params.accent_palette: pale gray, desaturated green, charcoal, warning amber
params.safe_zone_intent: keep the systems field above the subtitle band and leave the top UI band almost empty
params.signal_anchor: institutional monitoring field swallowing its own alert trace
params.historical_anchor: the Challenger failure as a systems problem distributed across monitoring labor and routine decision structures
params.surreal_breach: the alert trace is visibly absorbed into the background logic instead of standing apart from it

prompt_fragments.anchor_fragment: monitoring consoles and labor silhouettes compressed into one flattened systems portrait
support_fragments: a warning flare fading into the same grid that should have isolated it
muted institutional panels and quiet human traces kept subordinate to the systems read
